source_baseline.baseline: v0.44 submission preprint final package / v0.45 follow-up plan
source_baseline.wp: WP10 Zero forest proof language expansion

normalization_policy.normalized_hash: sha256-16(canonical_json(schema_major, kind, claim_id, object_signature, domain_signature, assumptions, zero_obligation, final_normal_form, rule_classes, side_condition_refs, formal_fragment))

rule_registry.description: Canonical associativity/commutativity of addition.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by scalar normal form or simplify difference

rule_registry.description: Canonical associativity/commutativity of multiplication.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by scalar normal form or simplify difference

rule_registry.description: f + (-f) cancels to zero.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by simplify(before-after)==0

rule_registry.description: 0*f or f*0 cancels to zero.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by simplify(before-after)==0

rule_registry.description: a/d - a/d cancels under certified nonzero denominator.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by simplify(before-after)==0 and domain side condition

rule_registry.description: exp(a)*exp(-a) cancels on the real branch.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by simplify(before-after)==0 with real branch side condition

rule_registry.description: Rational/Laurent expression normalization.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by simplify or Laurent seed normal form

rule_registry.description: Derivative of integer powers.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by sympy differentiation in exported scalar leaf

rule_registry.description: Second derivative of x^2 is 2 and of -y^2 is -2.
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by sympy differentiation in exported scalar leaf

rule_registry.description: Derivative of exp(k*u) is k*exp(k*u).
rule_registry.replay_semantics: checked by sympy differentiation in exported scalar leaf

rule_registry.description: Denominator is nonzero on the certified domain.

trusted: source subleaf hash and rule binding validation
coordinate/parameter scope coverage for selected AST nodes

full proof-assistant replay of the tensor identity
global semantic type inference for arbitrary tensor expressions

certificates.notes: v0.5 refines the FLRW contracted-Bianchi seed by naming the tensor subleaves feeding the scalar cancellation. The scalar leaf remains replayed; the tensor derivation remains a declared boundary. v0.8 adds typed provenance to each AST-located tensor-scalar export.

tensor_subleaves.selected_check: G^{00}=3*H**2 for flat de Sitter FLRW under selected sign convention
